title: laggera lyrata
intro: Laggera lyrata, also known as African bush tea or wild sage, is a perennial herb native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Laggera lyrata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Laggera lyrata can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or in capsule or extract form, for its medicinal and health benefits.
